title: Under the hood: Security architecture of GitHub Agentic Workflows
snippet: GitHub's agentic workflow architecture aims for zero agent access to secrets, but authentication tokens in environment variables remain susceptible to prompt injection attacks that trick agents into leaking credentials.

title: The Runtime Behind Production Deep Agents
snippet: Details LangChain's production runtime including Agent Auth for third-party services (OAuth dance, token storage, user-scoped credentials) and sandbox auth proxies that inject credentials via sidecar to prevent exfiltration.

title: January 2026: LangChain Newsletter
snippet: Discusses upcoming auth and identity features for LangChain agents, including RBAC policies and workspace-level secret management in LangSmith.

title: CrewAI Multi-Agent Workflow Guide [2026]
snippet: Setting allow_delegation=True lets agents decide at runtime whether to pass subtasks to other agents. For controlled delegation, the allowed_agents parameter restricts which subordinates an agent can delegate to.

title: AI Agents in 2026: Microsoft Governance, Identity Perimeter, and Email Risk
snippet: Microsoft's Agent Identity Perimeter extends Conditional Access to agent-initiated actions, evaluating context—agent risk level, resource sensitivity—at every resource touch under Zero Trust principles.

title: The Evidence and Control Layer for Enterprise AI
snippet: Oracle outlines an evidence and control layer for enterprise AI that enforces deterministic guardrails — approval gates when spend crosses budget thresholds, blocking unregistered tools, and preventing child-agent delegation outside approved scope.
source_query: enterprise AI agent spending policy controls

title: What the EU AI Act requires for AI agent logging
snippet: Details on Article 50 transparency and logging requirements for AI agents, including interaction disclosure and content identification mandates taking effect August 2026.
source_query: EU AI Act agent identity requirements 2026

title: EU AI Act News 2026: Compliance Requirements & Deadlines
snippet: Tracks 2026 compliance deadlines and requirements including high-risk AI system obligations, transparency rules for agent identity disclosure, and the August 2 full applicability date.
source_query: EU AI Act agent identity requirements 2026

title: Cyber unicorn Silverfort acquires one-year-old AI startup Fabrix for tens of millions
snippet: Silverfort acquired Fabrix to build real-time identity protection and access control for human, non-human, and AI agent identities.

title: The three biggest agentic commerce trends from NRF 2026
snippet: Stripe highlights payment orchestration, agent-native checkout, and merchant data quality as the three infrastructure pillars driving agentic commerce adoption in 2026.

title: AI Captured 61% of Global Venture Capital in 2025 — AgentMarketCap
snippet: Q1 2026 shattered every venture funding record at $300B globally. OpenAI ($122B), Anthropic ($30B), xAI ($20B), Waymo ($16B) collectively absorbed ~63% of global VC.
source_query: AI agent infrastructure venture capital investment

title: AI-Focused VC Firms and Investors by Stage and Founder Fit (2026) — Sky9 Capital
snippet: Seed-to-Series-A investors increasingly target agent-native infrastructure: credential management, tool-use orchestration, and multi-agent coordination frameworks.

title: Worldcoin Introduces AI Agent Authentication Solution, Eightco Secures $250 Million to Back WLD Investments
snippet: Worldcoin introduces an AI agent authentication solution allowing verified humans to delegate identity credentials to autonomous agents, with Eightco raising $250M to invest in WLD token.
source_query: Worldcoin World ID AI agents verification

title: Worldcoin remains overlooked amid AI-driven demand for Proof of Human verification
snippet: Worldcoin's proof-of-human verification system gains relevance as AI-driven demand grows. The World network includes nearly 18 million verified individuals across 160+ countries. Vercel integrated World ID's Proof of Human into its agentic infrastructure.
source_query: Worldcoin World ID AI agents verification

title: AI Agent Wallets in 2026: How Crypto Is Being Rebuilt for Autonomous On-Chain AI
snippet: At Consensus 2026, infrastructure executives said AI agents are forcing wallets to be rebuilt from scratch. Agents need to hold assets, execute onchain transactions, and carry verifiable on-chain identities — wallets become the default financial layer for autonomous software.

title: Coinbase Launches Agentic Wallets: First Wallet Infrastructure Built for AI Agents
snippet: Coinbase Agentic Wallets give AI agents their own on-chain identity with programmable spending policies, non-custodial identity, and secure permissioned execution — holding USDC, swapping tokens, paying for APIs, and executing financial operations autonomously.

title: Understanding Programmable Key Pairs From Lit Protocol: A Guide | HackerNoon
snippet: Guide to Lit Protocol's PKP system combining MPC + TSS with TEEs for decentralized key management. Covers how PKPs enable programmable signing logic via Lit Actions published to IPFS.
source_query: Lit Protocol programmable key pairs agents

title: Turnkey Review 2026: Embedded Wallet Infrastructure, Key Control, and the Real Custody Tradeoff
snippet: Review of Turnkey's embedded wallet infrastructure covering MPC key management, TEE-based signing, AI agent wallet support, and enterprise-grade custody tradeoffs.
